mapper.select: SELECT oi.*, p.prod_nm AS prod_nm_current, p.thumbnail_url, p.sale_price, sk.sku_code, oi1.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_1, oi2.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_2, cd_is.code_label AS order_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_order_item oi LEFT JOIN pd_prod p ON p.prod_id = oi.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_sku sk ON sk.sku_id = oi.sku_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_2 LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'ORDER_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_is.code_value = oi.order_item_status_cd WHERE oi.order_item_id = #{id}

SELECT oi.*, p.thumbnail_url, sk.sku_code, oi1.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_1, oi2.opt_item_nm AS opt_item_nm_2, cd_is.code_label AS order_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_order_item oi LEFT JOIN pd_prod p ON p.prod_id = oi.prod_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_sku sk ON sk.sku_id = oi.sku_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi1 ON oi1.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_1 LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item oi2 ON oi2.opt_item_id = oi.opt_item_id_2 LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'ORDER_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_is.code_value = oi.order_item_status_cd WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.reg_date ASC
